title: Hasbro (HAS) Partners With NBA & NBPA to Relaunch Starting Lineup
text: Hasbro (HAS) teams up with the National Basketball Association and National Basketball Players Association for the relaunch of Starting Lineup, an iconic sports collectibles brand.

title: Hasbro Teams Up With the NBA and NBPA for the Return of Starting Lineup This Fall
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Hasbro, Inc., has announced a partnership with the National Basketball Association (NBA) and National Basketball Players Association (NBPA) for the highly anticipated re-launch of Starting Lineup, an iconic sports collectibles brand. The Starting Lineup collectible will also include an exclusive, officially licensed Panini NBA trading card. Launching this fall in partnership with Fanatics, a global digital sports platform, the Starting Lineup brand will

title: Hasbro/Mattel Pair Trade Still OK
text: Over the last year, investment prospects for Mattel and Hasbro have swapped places, even though both companies face common problems largely outside of their control. Mattel is now solidly managed with potential to be acquired. Hasbro has sadly lost its CEO and an important Disney-branded line.

title: Hasbro Board of Directors Issues Letter to Shareholders
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS), a global play and entertainment company, today issued a letter to shareholders following its 2022 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The full text of the letter is below, which can also be found, at www.HasbroGamePlan.com. title: 3 Beaten-Down Names to Consider for Total Returns and Income
text: The nearly 19% decline in the S&P 500 year to date has led to many stocks falling, even those that have strong business models. As a result, investors can find high-quality stocks trading near their 52-week lows.

title: Dungeons & Dragons-maker Hasbro wins board battle against activist investor Alta Fox
text: Hasbro has fended off a challenge from an activist investor that wanted to shake up its board and spin off the company's Wizards of the Coast division.

title: Alta Fox Issues Statement Regarding Outcome of Election Contest at Hasbro
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Alta Fox Capital Management, LLC (together with its affiliates, “Alta Fox” or “we”), the beneficial owner of approximately 2.5% of the outstanding shares of Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS) (“Hasbro” or the “Company”), today issued the following statement regarding its campaign to refresh the Company's Board of Directors (the “Board”) at the 2022 Annual Meeting of Shareholders (the “Annual Meeting”). title: Hasbro defeats board challenge from activist investor Alta Fox
text: Hasbro Inc defeated a board challenge from activist hedge fund Alta Fox with shareholders re-electing all of the company's directors, the toymaker said on Wednesday, citing a preliminary tally of voting results.

title: Hasbro Shareholders Re-Elect All Directors at Annual Meeting
text: PAWTUCKET, R.I.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS), a global play and entertainment company, today announced the preliminary results at the 2022 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, as provided by its proxy solicitors, which indicate that Hasbro shareholders have voted, with a substantial margin, to re-elect all 13 of Hasbro's highly qualified directors to the Hasbro Board: Richard Stoddart, Kenneth Bronfin, Michael Burns, Hope Cochran, Chris Cocks, Lisa Gersh, Elizabeth Hamren, Blake Jorg

title: Exclusive: Hasbro set to defeat Alta Fox board challenge-sources
text: Hasbro Inc is poised to prevail over a board challenge from activist hedge fund Alta Fox, people familiar with the matter said on Tuesday.
